title: typescript Configuration Schema
description: Schema for configuration specific to a typescript SDK

author.description: The name of the author of the published package. <https://docs.npmjs.com/cli/v9/configuring-npm/package-json#people-fields-author-contributors>

clientServerStatusCodesAsErrors.description: Whether to treat 4xx and 5xx status codes as errors.

compileCommand.description: The command to use for compiling the SDK. This must be an array where the first element is the command and the rest are arguments.

defaultErrorName.description: The name of the default error class used to represent API errors

enableCustomCodeRegions.description: Allow custom code to be inserted into the generated SDK.

enableReactQuery.description: Generate React hooks using TanStack Query.

enumFormat.description: Determines the format to express enums in TypeScript

envVarPrefix.description: The environment variable prefix for security and global env variable overrides. If empty these overrides will not be possible

flattenGlobalSecurity.description: Flatten the global security configuration if there is only a single option in the spec

flatteningOrder.description: When flattening parameters and body fields, determines the ordering of generated method arguments.

inputModelSuffix.description: The suffix to add to models with writeOnly fields that are created as input models

maxMethodParams.description: The maximum number of parameters a method can have before the resulting SDK endpoint is no longer 'flattened' and an input object is created instead. 0 will use input objects always. <https://www.speakeasy.com/docs/customize-sdks/methods>

methodArguments.description: Determines how arguments for SDK methods are generated

moduleFormat.description: Specifies the module format to use when compiling the SDK.

outputModelSuffix.description: The suffix to add to models with writeOnly fields that are created as input models

responseFormat.description: Determines the shape of the response envelope that is returned from SDK methods

useIndexModules.description: Determine whether or not index modules (index.ts) are generated

version.description: The current version of the SDK
